title: Multi-Section Landing Website with Modern Dark Theme

requirements.summary: Create a fully functional multi-section landing website with sticky navigation, hero, about, features, and contact sections
acceptanceCriteria: A sticky top navigation bar links to each page section (Home, About, Features, Contact).
A hero section is displayed prominently at the top with a headline, subheading, and a call-to-action button.
An About section describes the site's purpose.
A Features/Services section lists key highlights with icons or cards.
A Contact/Footer section includes placeholder contact info and copyright text.
The page is fully responsive on mobile and desktop.

file_operations.description: Replace existing content with a single-page layout that includes sticky navigation and four main sections: hero, about, features, and contact/footer. Wire the generated hero background image from frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1440x800.png as the hero section background. Wire the generated logo mark from frontend/public/assets/generated/logo-mark.dim_128x128.png into the navigation bar. Ensure all sections are anchor-linked from the navigation.

Create a sticky top navigation bar component that displays the logo mark from frontend/public/assets/generated/logo-mark.dim_128x128.png and includes anchor links to Home, About, Features, and Contact sections. Implement smooth scroll behavior and highlight the active section.

Create a hero section component with the generated background image from frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1440x800.png. Include a headline, subheading, and call-to-action button. Ensure the section is fully responsive.
Create an about section component that describes the site's purpose. Include a section heading and descriptive text. Ensure responsive layout.
Create a features/services section component that displays key highlights using card components. Include icons or visual markers for each feature. Ensure a responsive grid layout.
Create a contact/footer section component with placeholder contact information, social links, and copyright text. Ensure responsive layout.

requirements.summary: Apply a bold, modern visual theme with dark charcoal and warm amber color palette, clean typography, and consistent hover interactions
acceptanceCriteria: The color scheme uses dark charcoal as the primary background and warm amber as the accent color.
Typography uses a clean sans-serif font applied consistently throughout.
Interactive elements (buttons, nav links, cards) have visible hover state transitions.
The visual theme is applied consistently across all sections.

file_operations.description: Define CSS custom properties for the dark charcoal and warm amber color palette. Apply a clean sans-serif font family as the base typography. Add global styles for consistent spacing, hover transitions, and card shadows.

Extend the Tailwind theme with custom colors for dark charcoal (primary background) and warm amber (accent). Configure typography with a clean sans-serif font stack. Add custom utilities for card shadows and hover transitions.
